message:
fix: subagent close waits, no MCP inheritance, safe working_dir (GAP-7.05/7.06/7.07)

- closeAgent now calls Close() then waits for the goroutine to finish
  before reading status, so callers never see stale "running" status
- Subagent config clears MCPConfigFiles and MCPInline to prevent
  subagents from inheriting parent MCP server connections
- Non-LocalExecutionEnvironment with working_dir returns error instead
  of creating an isolated LocalExecutionEnvironment without shared PIDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
